message:
feat(explorer): add JSON summary serialization for exploration reports

Add ExplorationReportJson and supporting types (RunSummary,
ViolationSummary, TopologicalScoreJson, UnexploredSeedJson) to enable
JSON export of exploration results without heavy per-run violation
payloads. Derive Serialize on CoverageMetrics, SaturationMetrics, and
DporCoverageMetrics.

Includes to_json_string(), to_json_pretty(), and write_json_summary()
convenience methods, plus two tests: one verifying core JSON fields are
present and one round-tripping through a temp file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
